title: ToadOdyssey
description: a Light modpack with simple changes, nothig major, easy on the player,
body:
## Minecraft Mods Summary

### 2. Origins

- **Description:** Adds new character origins or classes to the game.

### 3. Simple Voice Chat

- **Description:** Introduces voice chat functionality for players.

### 4. Sodium

- **Description:** A performance optimization mod for Minecraft.

### 5. Origins: Classes

- **Description:** Extension or variation of the Origins mod, introducing additional character classes.

### 6. Fabric Language Kotlin

- **Description:** Supports the Kotlin programming language within the Fabric modding framework.

### 8. Entity Culling

- **Description:** Enhances performance by selectively culling or rendering entities.

### 10. Create Utilities

- **Description:** Utility features for the Create mod.

### 12. Create Fabric

- **Description:** Expands the Create mod's capabilities within the Fabric modding framework.

### 14. Create: Steam 'n' Rails

- **Description:** Extension to the Create mod, introducing steam and rail-related features.

### 15. Wildfire's Female Gender Mod

- **Description:** Introduces female character models or gender-related features.

### 16. CC: Tweaked

- **Description:** Enhances and extends the ComputerCraft mod.

### 17. Alternate Origin GUI

- **Description:** Adds an alternative graphical user interface for the Origins mod.

### 18. Mod Menu

- **Description:** Provides an in-game menu for managing and configuring mods.

### 19. Origins++

- **Description:** An expansion or modification of the Origins mod, likely introducing additional features.

### 20. Create: Diesel Generators [Fabric]

- **Description:** Adds diesel generators to the Create mod.

### 22. Pehkui

- **Description:** Modifies player and entity size-related mechanics.

### 23. Just Enough Items

- **Description:** Provides an in-game item and recipe viewer.

### 24. Immersive Aircraft

- **Description:** Introduces immersive aircraft or flying-related features.

### 25. LambDynamicLights

- **Description:** Adds dynamic lighting features to the game.

  [![Subscribe to Toadodyssey on YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/Subscribe%20on-YouTube-red?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube)](https://www.youtube.com/@ToadOdyssey/featured)

# Toadodyssey Modpack Event Server

Welcome, adventurers, to the Toadodyssey Modpack Event Server—an immersive gaming experience hosted by the renowned streamer and YouTuber, Toadodyssey! Embark on a journey like never before, where the realms of fantasy come to life through carefully curated mods and thrilling events. 

## Server Highlights

- **Epic Events:** Join Toadodyssey and fellow adventurers in regularly scheduled events that will test your skills, teamwork, and creativity. Whether it's a massive boss battle, a treasure hunt, or a daring quest, each event promises excitement and rewards.

- **Live Streaming:** Be part of Toadodyssey's live streams as he explores the server, interacts with the community, and dives into the adventures that unfold. Join the chat, share your experiences, and witness epic moments together.

- **VODs Channel:** For recorded streams and VODs, check out Toadodyssey's second YouTube channel.

Server. The lands await your exploration!

 **Follow Toadodyssey:** Stay updated on upcoming events, server news, and exclusive content by following Toadodyssey on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/toadodyssey) and subscribing to both [YouTube channels](https://www.youtube.com/@ToadOdyssey/featured) ([Main Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@ToadOdyssey/featured) and [VODs Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@toadcasual9900)).

## Community Guidelines

- **Respect and Collaboration:** Foster a positive and collaborative community environment. Work together, share resources, and embark on adventures as a united front.

- **Creativity Encouraged:** Let your creativity shine! Build awe-inspiring structures, craft unique items, and contribute to the ever-evolving world of Toadodyssey.

- **Have Fun!:** Ultimately, this server is a space for enjoyment. Whether you're a seasoned explorer or a newcomer, savor the journey and create memories that will last a lifetime.

Join Toadodyssey and fellow adventurers on the Toadodyssey Modpack Event Server—where epic tales unfold, and the extraordinary becomes the norm. May your adventures be legendary!
